questions.question: Consider that the input to a CNN is a 3D tensor with shape H, W, D (where D >= 2). We apply two types of kernels on this input: k1 with a shape h_k, w_k, 1 and k2 with a shape of h_k, w_k, D (where h_k < H, w_k < W, D = D). Which of the following is/are valid for the feature maps after applying k1 or k2 on the input? Select ALL that apply

options.A: The third dimension of the feature map after applying k2 is going to be 1.
options.B: Applying k1 on the input can be referred to as 3D convolution.
options.C: Applying k2 on the input can be referred to as 3D convolution.
options.D: The third dimension of the feature map after applying k1 is going to be D.
